programme.desc: The stars of MST3K riff the classic Manos - the Hands of Fate! Run, don't stumble-walk-with-accursed-goat-legs to watch RiffTrax: Manos!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this driving scare film. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Borrowed Power!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 give their comedic riffing treatment to this classic 90's Vanilla Ice movie. Stop, collaborate and listen as Mike, Kevin and Bill team up to riff Cool As Ice.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Birdemic: Shock and Terror is what you'd get if the Ice Cream Bunny starred in The Happening as directed by Tommy Wiseau. Mike, Kevin and Bill invite you to join them for this must-see RiffTrax. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.sub-title: Shorts: You Can Do Something About Acne
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about pizza faced youths. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill as they learn that You Can Do Something About Acne!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Deep in the Mexican jungle, a legendary creature lurks in a swamp. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Robert De Niro and John Travolta star as two veterans hunting each other in this action thriller.

programme.title: Dark Tide (2011)
programme.desc: Kate (Halle Berry) accepts a lucrative opportunity to lead a thrill-seeking millionaire businessman on a shark dive in the most dangerous waters…outside the cage.

programme.title: Crocodile
programme.desc: A group of friends goes out on a boat trip on a lake in Southern California � but their joyful weekend turns into horror when a giant killer crocodile, searching for its stolen eggs, picks off anyone who gets in its way. Can they all escape in one piece or will they slowly and painfully fall to the mammoth reptile?

programme.title: Grand Isle
programme.desc: Walter (Nicolas Cage) and his neglected wife lure a young man into their Victorian home to escape a hurricane. When the man is charged with murder by Det. Jones (Kelsey Grammar), he must reveal the couple's wicked secrets to save himself.

programme.title: Last Shoot Out
programme.desc: Bruce Dern (The Hateful Eight) lights up this gritty, intense Western saga of love, betrayal, and revenge. After newlywed Jocelyn learns that her husband Jody (Michael Welch, Twilight) had her father shot down, she flees from the Callahan ranch in fear. She's rescued by gunman Billy Tyson, who safeguards her at a remote outpost as he staves off Jody's attempts to reclaim his bride. As the angry Callahans keep Billy, Jocelyn, and others captive at the outpost, an explosive showdown is inevitable.

programme.title: Mechanic Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop [Jason Statham] returns as the Mechanic in the sequel to the 2011 action-thiller. When the deceitful actions of a cunning but beautiful woman [Jessica Alba] force him to return to the life he left behind, Bishop's life is once again in danger as he has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A hip Detroit detective (Eddie Murphy) drives out to Los Angeles and shows local police (Judge Reinhold, John Ashton) how to catch a killer.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The heat's back on! And Eddie Murphy is cool as ever in this sizzling, smash-hit sequel to Beverly Hills Cop. Axel Foley (Murphy) is back-back where he doesn't belong! He's going "deep, deep, deep undercover" into the chic wilds of Southern California, unleashing his arsenal of blazing gunfire and rapid-fire gags against a gang of international munitions smugglers. Back, too, are Judge Reinhold and John Ashton as Murphy's crime-busting sidekicks. And Top Gun's director Tony Scott keeps the pace fast, furious and funny.

programme.title: The Homesman
programme.desc: Tommy Lee Jones stars in “the best western since UNFORGIVEN” (BBC). A low-life drifter helps a headstrong woman (Hilary Swank) cross the frontier after she rescues him from hanging.

programme.title: Last Shoot Out
programme.desc: Bruce Dern (The Hateful Eight) lights up this gritty, intense Western saga of love, betrayal, and revenge. After newlywed Jocelyn learns that her husband Jody (Michael Welch, Twilight) had her father shot down, she flees from the Callahan ranch in fear. She's rescued by gunman Billy Tyson, who safeguards her at a remote outpost as he staves off Jody's attempts to reclaim his bride. As the angry Callahans keep Billy, Jocelyn, and others captive at the outpost, an explosive showdown is inevitable.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A hip Detroit detective (Eddie Murphy) drives out to Los Angeles and shows local police (Judge Reinhold, John Ashton) how to catch a killer.

programme.title: A Harvest Homecoming
programme.desc: A teacher (Trevor Donovan) returns home to help at the family cider mill, where he meets the new marketing manager (Jessica Lowndes) and finds a new class of students to mentor.

programme.title: Swing Into Romance
programme.desc: A dancer (Danica McKellar) pairs with an unlikely partner (David Haydn-Jones), entering a contest to save her family's General Store.

programme.title: Girl's Best Friend
programme.desc: Cynical music critic Mary, who has never gotten over her failed marriage, refuses to open her heart again. But when she gets stuck on a cross-country road trip, her heart begins to soften.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's I Can Do Bad All By Myself
programme.desc: An uplifting drama infused with music and Tyler Perry's trademark mixture of laughter and heart, I CAN DO BAD ALL BY MYSELF features dramatic and musical performances by Gladys Knight, Marvin Winans and Mary J. Blige.

programme.title: A Gift of Miracles
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Darcy finds a list of belongings her estranged mother intended to give to away.

programme.title: My Gal Sunday
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A newlywed couple must prove their crime-solving prowess.

programme.title: Color My World with Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Emma's daughter, who has Down Syndrome, is in a new romance Emma must navigate.

programme.title: Along Came a Nanny
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Detective Mike Logan takes on a special undercover assignment as a nanny.

programme.title: Love by Chance
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Without her knowledge, Claire's meddling mother finds her the perfect man.

programme.title: The Hillsdale Adoption Scam
programme.desc: Bethany and Terrence are desperate to find another brother for their daughter.

programme.title: Remember Me, Mommy?
programme.desc: Rebecca, a teacher at Clark Academy, an elite girls boarding school, has a secret.

programme.title: Murder on Maple Drive
programme.desc: A couple purchases a home, and after they move in, strange things begin to happen.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: True stories of women in peril as told by the people involved. A teacher's sex scandal with one of her students turns everything upside down.

programme.title: The Hillsdale Adoption Scam
programme.desc: Bethany and Terrence are desperate to find another brother for their daughter.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: A group of retired secret agents reunite when they are targeted by mysterious assassins.

programme.title: Red 2
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses and his team of hapless heroes are tasked with finding a dangerous nuclear weapon

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan discovers the people who raised him are not his parents, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Red Eye
programme.desc: Moments after takeoff, Lisa's seatmate, Jackson, menacingly reveals the real reason he's on board

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A Naval officer, reprimanded after Pearl Harbor, is later promoted to Rear Admiral

programme.title: Gone Baby Gone
programme.desc: Two Boston area detectives investigate a little girl's kidnapping, which ultimately turns into a crisis

programme.title: No Mercy
programme.desc: A big-city cop follows a gorgeous blond to New Orleans to avenge the murder of his partner. Edited for TV

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: A public defender pokes into places she shouldn't while trying to exonerate an innocent man accused of murder. Edited for TV

programme.title: The Lazarus Project
programme.desc: A harrowing and frightening thriller about a man who has everything he's ever loved stripped away from him and to earn his life and family back, he must face obstacles of mystical origins, endure countless tests of his faith, struggle with his own sanity, and explore the depth and the power of his soul.

programme.title: The Principal
programme.desc: At the toughest high school in town, the biggest troublemaker is the principal. Edited for TV

programme.title: The Bedford Incident
programme.desc: The captain of a newly launched U.S. Destroyer is obsessed with hunting down a particular Soviet submarine regardless of the great risks involved.

programme.title: The Miracle Woman
programme.desc: A preacher's daughter becomes a pawn in a con man's elaborate ruse to pass her off as a faith healer.

programme.title: Tonight And Every Night
programme.desc: Romance blooms between an American showgirl and an RAF pilot during Nazi air raids in wartime London.

programme.title: Duffy
programme.desc: Duffy is a cunning aristocrat of criminals who is hired by Stefane, a young playboy, to hijack a boat carrying several million dollars of his father's fortune. The plot succeeds, with a little help from Segolene, Stefane's girlfriend - but also with an unexpected, sudden turn of events.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

programme.title: Paris When It Sizzles
programme.desc: Richard Quine directs George Axelrod's acerbic script (adapted from Julien Duvivier's La Fête à Henriette) in this romantic comedy that reunites William Holden and Audrey Hepburn for the first time since 1954's Sabrina.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Holiday Inn
programme.desc: This musical follows a man who leaves showbiz to run an inn, and his former partner and rival in love.

programme.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
programme.desc: A Southern lawyer compassionately defends a black man accused of rape.

programme.title: The Ipcress File
programme.desc: Crook-turned-secret-agent Harry Palmer tries to find a missing scientist.

programme.title: Crooklyn
programme.desc: Make yourself at home with the Carmichaels as they raise their kids in difficult, but often wonderful, circumstances in their close-knit Brooklyn neighborhood.

programme.title: Blush
programme.desc: The sexual, psychological and moral unraveling of an obsessive-compulsive, suburban mom. Starring Wendi McLendon-Covey, Christine Woods, Max Burkholder and Steve Little.

programme.title: Limerence
programme.desc: Rosemary, an aspiring painter and free spirit, moves to Venice, California where she falls for Tom, a charismatic gallery director. Their intense chemistry quickly evolves into a serious relationship that puts Rosemary to the test.

programme.title: Love Flower
programme.desc: Our guy Joshua is in a rut that is peaking with one of those bad days where things can't possibly get any worse in every single aspect of his life. Until his old pal Bucky shows up with even more bad news.

programme.title: Conception
programme.desc: Vic and Ami are living the perfect married life, but their world turns upside down when they attempt to start a family.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant but must pretend to be married.

programme.title: Let Love Grow
programme.desc: Landscape architect Evie meets her match with new client Ryan, whose daughters are her biggest fan.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Alice is up for partner at her firm and hires her sister's manny, Jacob, to help with her daughter.

programme.title: The Perfect Mate
programme.desc: After Hope's fiancé breaks up with her, platonic friend Jesse acts as a stand in to meet her parents.

programme.title: The Wedding in the Hamptons
programme.desc: A designer debuts at a Hamptons wedding and is mistaken for a socialite and falls for a groomsman.

programme.title: Girlfriends Getaway
programme.desc: An Innocent birthday getaway turns into absolute adventure when four long time friends looking for excitement in Trinidad find an escapade that leads them to Kidnapping, a robbery, and possible jail time.

programme.title: Girlfriends Getaway II
programme.desc: A bride and her three friends travel to Puerto Rico for her wedding when chaos ensues.

programme.title: Mama Flora's Family
programme.desc: Part 1: Upon being called upon to help her troubled granddaughter, a Southern black woman in her 70s looks back on a life filled with joy and heartbreak.

programme.title: Mama Flora's Family
programme.desc: Part 2: Upon being called upon to help her troubled granddaughter, a Southern black woman in her 70s looks back on a life filled with joy and heartbreak.

programme.title: Hello Ghost
programme.desc: A loner's failed suicide attempt causes him to see four ghosts who keep following him everywhere. He tries to get rid of these spirits by fulfilling their regrets.

programme.title: The Girl on A Bulldozer
programme.desc: A single father gets into a mysterious car accident, leaving Hye-yeong and her young brother all alone.

programme.title: The Huntresses
programme.desc: Joseon's best bounty hunter, Jin-ok, takes on a high-reward case, unaware it points to her father's killer.

programme.title: My Little Bride
programme.desc: Bo-eun must marry Sang-min due to a family promise. Things get complicated when he becomes her school teacher.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: After a recent breakup, Derrick, a hopeless romantic, moves into a new apartment looking for a fresh start in life. He quickly discovers that his beautiful next door neighbor, Jessie, may be in an abusive relationship. When she reaches out to him for help, they hatch a scheme to get away from danger.

programme.title: Keisha
programme.desc: Keisha always had a problem finding a decent job in her community. Financial hardship gets worse for her and her son after her grandmother dies and only leaves behind a Bible. Struggling to take care of her son and pay bills she turns to a job at a strip club. It's all to get a new life in a new city and away from the blackmailing child protective services agent. What sacrifices will she make for her and her son?

programme.title: Lacee
programme.desc: Four talented girls from different backgrounds form a R&B group with the intentions of being the best. They will soon find out that their dark journey consists of sex, power, and betrayal.

programme.title: Ladies Choice
programme.desc: A male exotic dancer named Choice and his fellow exotic entertainers find themselves in a bind after taking on a side job outside of their normal club which escalates into sex, lies, and a race against time.

programme.title: Mahogany
programme.desc: Mo, a young woman growing up in the trenches of an urban neighborhood, faces drugs, crime, violence, and poverty. All become driving factors that will test Mo's decision to rise above her circumstances as danger grows beyond her control.

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player becomes entangled with drug dealers, he turns to an ex-cop and former private eye. Starring Ice-T, Gary Busey, Fred Williamson and Jim Brown.

programme.title: Ninja: Shadow of a Tear
programme.desc: After his wife is brutally murdered, a martial-arts master (Scott Adkins) teams up with an old friend (Kane Kosugi) to sharpen his battle skills and seek revenge.

programme.title: Faces in the Crowd
programme.desc: A serial killer closes in on a woman (Milla Jovovich) who no longer recognizes people's faces after barely surviving a deadly attack.

programme.title: King of the Avenue
programme.desc: An ambitious drug dealer sells his soul to the devil to become the city's biggest drug boss, knowing that when Satan comes to collect, he'll have to outwit a most evil force.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Taking Earth
programme.desc: The human race is thrown into chaos as an alien invasion takes control of the planet in an effort to find one boy out of seven billion people who holds the power to destroy them.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Control
programme.desc: A sociopath on death row (Ray Liotta, "Goodfellas") is given a chance to live if he agrees to take part in a chemical behavior modification program. Also starring Willem Dafoe, Michelle Rodriguez ("Lost") and Stephen Rea ("The Crying Game").

programme.title: Van Halen
programme.desc: VAN HALEN achieved worldwide fame for their many popular songs and larger-than-life stage performances they also became known for the drama surrounding the departures of former members. Controversy surrounded the band following the exits of Roth, Hagar, and Anthony this controversy often included numerous conflicting press statements between the former members and the band. In 2007, Van Halen was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. VH1 ranked them 7th on their list of the top 100 hard rock artists of all time. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic band.

programme.title: Kiss
programme.desc: Kiss is one of the legendary groups in Hard Rock history. They have millions of fans around the world and over 100 million records sold. KISS confirms why they have been the best on the scene for nearly four decades, in a performance that made history, impressing an audience of more than 85,000 people, in a show of more than 2 hours and packed with hits, held at the Nurburgring, Germany in 2010.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: El padre le informa a Maricruz que tiene que desalojar el rancho lo antes posible José Antonio se encuentra con Octavio y le informa que Maricruz se va a casar con Álvaro.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: Maricruz le dice a Perico que podría tener un hijo sordomudo como su hermana José Antonio es llevado a su casa herido, Miguel y Esther se espantan al verlo así.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio le propone a Adolfo matar a Manuel a cambio de su libertad. Matilde va a hablar con Remigio para que le explique el motivo del arresto de su administrador. Prudencia le dice que es una insensata por ponerse en evidencia.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio le dice a Adolfo que lo va a acompañar por si le falla la puntería. Manuel recibe la carta de Adolfo citándolo y Silvano le dice que no vaya, que tal vez lo quiera matar. Pero Manuel le responde que no hay motivos para temer.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que siempre lo amará y que está feliz porque se solucionó el problema de Adolfo. Antonia le dice a Rosario que ya está vieja y que es tiempo de dejarle el lugar a una persona más joven.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Catalina le dice a Adolfo que le queda poco tiempo de vida y le pide que la lleve a ciudad Santiago con su madrina. José María le dice a Josefina que se casará, pero que no habrá festejo.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Manuel le recrimina a Rosario que haya mentido respecto a su lugar de origen. Matilde le dice que Rosario tiene derecho a guardar secretos. Manuel le dice a Antonia que le buscará casa en el pueblo.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa lleva a cabo sus planes y besa a Fernando para que quede enamorado de ella. Teresa logra convencer que Arturo y ella se muden al departamento de Fernando.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Luisa se encuentra con Lucía, una vieja amiga de la escuela. Arturo le pide a Jacinto vigile a Teresa para saber si sigue o no engañándolo. Rubén está dispuesto a todo para quitarle su hijo a Esperanza.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche se encuentra muy agradecida con Jorge Luis, ya que, gracias a él, su hermano se ha recuperado del accidente. Jorge Luis se pelea con Santiago al escuchar las cosas que le dice a su padre.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche duda del amor que Santiago siente por ella. Andresito es dado de alta y por fin regresa a su hogar. Meche planea celebrarle a Rosario sus 15 años para invitar a Jorge Luis y verlo de nuevo.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Marimar planea humillar a Angélica a cambio de no enviar a Renato a la cárcel. Gema y Arturo le piden a Bella que sea madrina de su boda.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Bella obliga a Angélica a sacar unos pagarés del lodo con los dientes, tal como se lo hizo ella alguna vez Angélica y Renato se enteran que Bella pagó la operación de su hijo.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María quiere divorciarse lo antes posible de Luis Fernando. Soraya continúa haciéndole la vida imposible a Alicia. María tiene un conflicto con Penélope al acusarla de robo. Luis Fernando se niega a darle el divorcio a María.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Gonzalo le pide a María que se case con él. Esperanza está completamente recuperada, y enfrenta a Soraya. Soraya le hace creer a Luis Fernando que pasaron la noche juntos.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche invita a Jorge Luis a la fiesta de 15 años de Rosario. Santiago comienza a preparar la boda y el testamento para María Mercedes.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche se pone triste al saber que Jorge Luis no asistirá a la fiesta de Rosario. La gente de la vecindad se prepara para la fiesta de Rosario y ayuda a Meche con los adornos. Rosario baila felizmente el vals principal con su padre.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Juan Miguel le confiesa a Omar que es el padre del bebé de Lirio y que su verdadero nombre es Marichuy. Cecilia va en busca de Marichuy pero ésta la rechaza y la repudia. Juan Miguel le confiesa a Marichuy que aún la ama.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Los padres de Vicente van a pedirle a Juan Miguel la mano de su hermana Rocío. Ivette va en busca de Omar, pero éste le dice que está enamorado de Marichuy y lo amenaza. Omar le dice a Marichuy que volverán a la hacienda aunque tenga que obligarla.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Leonor le dice a Ivana que puede perder la confianza de José Miguel si Sabino le dice la verdad. Ivana enfrenta a Valentina para decirle que está derrotada ante José Miguel. José Miguel va en búsqueda de Arcelia.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Ivana descubre que el comandante Toledo la está buscando. José Miguel piensa que Valentina le mintió y lo usó para vengarse de los hombres. El padre Justino le dice a José Miguel que se cuide de Ivana porque no está bien mentalmente.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Valentina le dice a Alonso que no quiere volver a verlo, ya que descubre que está bien de salud y continúa mintiéndole. Rosendo le pide trabajo a Leonor para vengarse de Valentina. José Miguel descubre que Ivana le mintió sobre su noche íntima.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Rosendo está obsesionado con Valentina y desea estar cerca de ella. Ivana recibe una notificación por parte de la policía para que declare sobre la muerte de Óscar. Chuy sufre un accidente que lo deja muy grave en el hospital.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Ivana le dice a Leonor que está embarazada y asegura que José Miguel es el padre del bebé. Alonso le dice a Toledo que cooperará con las autoridades para descubrir quién asesinó a Óscar y le confiesa que Ivana vive en la hacienda de Valentina.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Brenda va a buscar a Alonso a su casa y le pide que la deje vivir allí con Santiago. Valentina le informa a José Miguel que Chuy tuvo un terrible accidente y está en el hospital.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Héctor permanece junto a su hermana. Justo asiste al velorio y habla con Alfonsina. ¿Qué le propondrá?

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Se confirma que Alejandro no es el padre de Bárbara. Héctor tiene en su poder una prueba importante. Justo engaña a Pilar.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Alfonsina permanece junto a Héctor. Justo tiene sed de venganza. Los restos de Rigoberto, Francisca y Gertrudis llegan en El manantial.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: La policía descubre que el verdadero asesino de Efraín es Cynthia. Cynthia idea un plan para poder huir del pueblo y evitar que sea arrestada. Bruno le hace creer a Cynthia que tendrá su apoyo incondicional para evitar que la policía la arreste.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: La policía continúa con las investigaciones para demostrar que Bruno está traicionando a Rogelio. Bruno y Vanesa enfurecen al saber que uno de sus principales compradores ha decidido asociarse con Rogelio.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Bruno le promete a Cynthia que evitará que la policía la lleve a prisión y logra que Cynthia le otorgue el poder para manejar sus bienes. Gustavo lleva a cabo sus planes para poder divorciarse de Cynthia.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Vanesa se niega a darle la mitad de sus bienes a Ana Paula. Bruno idea un plan para estafar a Vanesa. Cynthia enloquece al recibir a su hija. Macaria comienza una nueva vida en la ciudad de México. Ana Paula se prepara para su boda con Rogelio.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche: Declaración de amor

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Los empleados del hotel confunden a la mamá del dueño con otra mujer. Don Chava se enamora de la mamá del patrón y trata de conquistarla, pero ella lo desprecia.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Vítor le organiza una fiesta de quince años a su mamá porque nunca pudo celebrarlos y le pide a todos sus compañeros que lo apoyen siendo padrinos de su madre.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Don Cipriano le cuenta a los empleados que Ninel Conde celebrará su baby shower en el hotel, pero el licenciado Mariano Brajales le informa que hay una denuncia en contra del hotel porque no tiene las medidas de seguridad necesarias.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cipriano elige a Vitor como el empleado del mes y recibe de premio una noche en la suite presidencial del hotel. Vitor es atacado por Chabelita, don Chava lo salva y le dice que todos los huéspedes son zombies.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le llama a Cipriano y le dice que uno de sus amigos hará su fiesta en el hotel y él piensa que es Serapio, cuando descubre que se equivocó, se arrepiente de haber pagado todo.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano están a punto de ser expulsados del condominio, pero se hacen amigos de sus vecinos en una fiesta y les permiten quedarse.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor deciden cambiar su apariencia drásticamente para conquistar mujeres, pero optar por volver a su vida normal después de ver que el plan no funciona.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano se emocionan porque participarán en el juego final de su equipo del barrio y les piden ayuda a Natacha y Cuca para entrenar, pues son muy malos jugadores.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Nacho le regala un vestido a Cuca pero cuando confiesa que era de otra mujer ella se molesta. Albertano decide jugar en otro equipo de fútbol por culpa de Vítor.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano es estafado por una mujer que promete volverlo un famoso cantante, pero durante su presentación todos descubren la farsa de su voz.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María de Todos los Ángeles es una mujer que siente que se está haciendo vieja sin haber encontrado el amor de su vida. Ella tiene un sueño en el que los ángeles anuncian que pronto el amor de su vida va a llegar.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María decide provocar un encuentro con Albertano para verlo directamente a los ojos y descubrir si es el amor de su vida. La vida de Albertano corre peligro y María se arriesga para salvarlo.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Carmelo queda encerrado probando la alarma del negocio. María sueña que debe ganarse el corazón de Doña Lucha para conquistar a Albertano, y para eso prepara unos deliciosos chiles, aunque esto despierta un sentimiento de competencia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Raymundo y Viridiana le dicen a Lupita que Lola es adoptada. Franco le confiesa a Mía y Miguel que no sabe cómo hablar de sexo con ellos. Alma y Franco se besan y Reverte se molesta al verlos. Los chicos del otro Insti llegan y empieza la rivalidad.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Celina se anima al saber que Max la espera. Max le hace creer a Sol que Teo le dio un regalo. Sol queda en ridículo cuando Teo la rechaza enfrente de Mía. Sol le enseña a Miguel una foto de Mía con Enzo. Alma y Reverte discuten y Roberta los ve.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol le inventa a Gandía que Mia se acuesta con los chicos del equipo contrario. Los alumnos del Elite se pelean con los alumnos del Latinoamericano. Mia le agradece a Celina por salvarla de las intrigas de Sol.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta e Iñaki siguen a Reverte y secuestran a su perro. Bustamante le dice a Diego que se quiere casar. Tato sale con Vico y la deja abandonada en medio de una redada. Sol conoce a Sabrina y se empiezan a aliar en contra de Mía.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: José descubre que Luciano tuvo que escapar del lugar donde lo metió a trabajar Galia le reclama a Pascual que encubra los delitos de sus jefes Reverte descubre que Roberta le robó a su perro Sabrina le dice a Sol que tuvo relaciones con Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol le deja un anónimo a Mia, informándole sobre la relación de Sabrina con Miguel. Fátima le pregunta a Jose qué sabe de Gastón. Vico habla con Miguel sobre su amante y le promete no decirle nada a Mia. Sol se empeña en que Mia descubra todo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta insiste en que Reverte le diga la verdad. Gastón le dice a Gandía que Fátima tiene un pasado turbio. Miguel no quiere volver a ver a Sabrina. Nico le pide a Lupita que reanuden su noviazgo. Galia quiere divorciarse de Pascual.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego le pide a Roberta que lo ayude a que León no se entere que sigue en la banda Mia recibe una carta de Sabrina y Miguel se la quita Fátima llora y le dice a Gastón que la despidieron. Roberta le dice a Alma y Martín que ya sabe que son novios.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Aimeé se disfraza de Regina para poder escapar de la hacienda y ver a Juan. Regina sufre al saber que Renato está completamente enamorado de Aimeé. Juan decide terminar su relación con Aimeé.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: El Padre Mundo decide no aceptar a Regina en el convento. Noel cierra el trato con Rodrigo de hacer de la finca una propiedad de Renato. Clemencia descubre el lugar donde se esconde Juan.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Julia decide presentarse en la fiesta de Pablo y Gina causando conmoción entre los invitados. Pablo y Juan de Dios se ponen celosos al ver a Julia bailando con Guillermo. Pablo y Julia se besan.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Julia se enoja con Pablo por besarla. Fausto golpea a Julia frente a todos en la fiesta de Pablo y Gina. Pablo se despide de Julia, ella acepta que tiene sentimientos por él. Guillermo coquetea con Dinorah y ella se siente atraída.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Mireya encuentra a Dinorah con el Alejandro y ella la amenaza con hacerle daño a Remedios si dice algo. Rufino trata de abusar de Julia. Don Samuel trata de salvarla pero es golpeado por Rufino y cae inconsciente.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Socorro, la madre de Juan de Dios, aparece en la iglesia y recuperar a su hijo. El Padre Refugio le confiesa a Juan de Dios que lo quiere como a un hijo. Fausto vuelve a golpear a Julia, creyendo que pasó la noche con Guillermo.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Julia escucha a Pablo decir que no quiere quedarse en el pueblo por miedo a enamorarse de ella. Socorro propicia un encuentro con Juan de Dios para acercarse a él.

programme.title: Por un puñado de tierra
programme.desc: La hija de un hombre asesinado y despojado de sus tierras, les prepara una gran sorpresa a la familia rival.

programme.title: El Tigre de Santa Julia
programme.desc: Miguel Negrete es un desertor del Ejército mexicano devenido en el famoso bandido apodado "el Tigre de Santa Julia", que roba en beneficio de los pobres, pero es traicionado y entregado a las autoridades.

programme.title: Uno y medio contra el mundo
programme.desc: En una agradable amistad entre un hombre despreocupado y un muchachito, surge una extraña sorpresa.

programme.title: Los albañiles
programme.desc: El drama laboral de los albañiles mexicanos, que luchan por solucionar los problemas derivados de la pobreza.

programme.title: Dios No lo Quiera
programme.desc: Una mujer borracha cae en las redes de un hombre jugador y vividor, del que trata de escapar pero espera un hijo de él.

programme.title: Por ellas aunque mal paguen
programme.desc: Un hombre se hace pasar por noble para que su hija pueda casarse con un hacendado de Jalisco.

programme.title: Desnúdate, Lucrecia
programme.desc: Una joven que asiste a la despedida de soltera de una amiga se enamora del novio, y juntos viven una serie de aventuras.

programme.title: Los novios de mis hijas
programme.desc: Un hombre joven promete a su padrino encontrarles esposos buenos a sus cuatro hijas.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El hábito no hace al monje, pero lo distingue
programme.desc: Una joven tiene que vivir con su padre y su madrastra tras la muerte de su madre, su actitud frente a la vida es de sufrimiento y opta por no estudiar, ni trabajar, pero al conocer un joven que perdió las ganas de vivir, logrará ver la realidad.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Quien no cree a buena madre, cree a mala madrastra
programme.desc: Sonia es una mujer enamorada de Samuel él decide tener una relación con Vania, una mujer vividora que sólo lo quiere por su dinero y pretende robarle todo.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale solo andar, que mal casar
programme.desc: Elena encuentra a su novio en la cama con otra mujer a pesar de eso, lo perdona y acepta casarse con él. Pero en una discusión, David la golpea. A partir de ese momento, las cosas empeoran.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Cuando el diablo reza, engañar quiere
programme.desc: Maribel recibe una solicitud de amistad de una persona que se da a conocer como "poeta misterioso". Mari es tan confiada que no se imagina el peligro al que se enfrenta.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Quien por malos caminos anda, malos abrojos halla
programme.desc: Una joven y su padre sufren un asalto y al intentar proteger a su hija él le dispara al ladrón. Los hijos del ladrón deciden vengarse del asesino de su padre, pero el hermano menor no está de acuerdo a lo que se dedica su familia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una mujer sufre un asalto y su pareja le aconseja que vaya a poner una denuncia, pero ella teme hacerlo. La policía logra atrapar al ladrón que asaltó a la mujer, pero por falta de pruebas queda libre.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Una caída más es una caída menos
programme.desc: Xitlali vive con su papá. En la escuela, algunos de sus compañeros le quieren enseñar a tomar y fumar, pero una maestra se da cuenta y la manda a que asista a clases de box. Sin embargo, a su padre no le parece bien que aprenda ese deporte.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Carlos Ponce, Anahí y Christian Castro
programme.desc: Pequeños Gigantes llega a su fin con la participación de estrellas como Carlos Ponce, Anahí, Christian Castro y más. Se dará a conocer al equipo vencedor.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Galilea presenta a su hijo y los jueces seleccionan a los participantes de los 7 equipos.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Comienza la competencia y se forman los equipos. Galilea presenta al niño que ha sido el primer lugar en la tabla de posiciones.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Un hombre habla sobre el infierno que vivió con la desaparición de su esposa, pues no solo sufría por ella al no saber donde estaba, también tuvo que lidiar con el hecho de que se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Sacerdotes y pastores en ambos lados de la frontera tienen que enfrentar las agresiones de los cárteles de la droga. Ellos cuentan los ataques a sus iglesias y albergues, y algunos llevan armas de fuego bajo sus sotanas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Salmo 100 es una organización que lleva mensajes de paz y reconciliación. Las historias de Daniel, Adrián o Giovanni son ejemplos de que usa Salmo 100 para ayudar a más personas que quieren salir del mundo del crimen organizado en la frontera.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Hay veces que las familias son separadas por situaciones fortuitas. Alejandro Muñoz es un periodista cuyo propósito en su programa de televisión es reunir a familias separadas por diversos motivos. Él cuenta algunas de sus experiencias.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En Nueva York existe una importante cantidad de población inmigrante proveniente de Casa Blanca, un pueblo del estado de Puebla en México. Ellos desean reunirse de nuevo con sus padres después de muchos años de no verlos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una nueva generación de artistas del género urbano domina las listas de éxito a nivel mundial. Las letras de sus canciones están plagadas de violencia, crimen, sexo y drogas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Cordero y Venado se convirtieron en mejores amigos cuando iban a Estados Unidos como ilegales. Un coyote los vendió a una banda de traficantes de humanos y la familia de Venado pagó por su rescate.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La patrulla fronteriza de Estados Unidos tiene registro de que la mayoría de indocumentados que cruzan la frontera son centroamericanos. Dentro de esta población hay muchos menores de edad que viajan solos para reunirse con sus familiares.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Un programa de reconocida trayectoria, en el que se presentan especiales de reportajes de investigaciones periodísticas de temas de actualidad, de vanguardia, de opinión pública y de problemáticas sociales, este además tiene su faceta ligera y algunas veces incluye episodios con entrevistas exclusivas de los famosos y personajes que están haciendo noticia. El show despliega un panorama actual de los hechos más importantes del mundo y especialmente de las comunidades iberoamericanas, realizado por un grupo de periodistas reconocidos e importantes, cuyos trabajos profesionales han sido amplios, ellos tienen años de experiencia en el área del periodismo y son muy profesionales a la hora de presentar sus reportajes, teniendo en cuenta siempre la responsabilidad que tienen ante el público.

programme.title: Crónicas: Historias que hacen historia
programme.desc: Un programa de noticias y temas de actualidad, con una historia diferente cada semana.

programme.title: Algo personal con Jorge Ramos
programme.desc: Conversaciones íntimas con personalidades del mundo de habla hispana.

programme.title: Noticias Univision 24-7: Fin de semana
programme.desc: Las noticias más importantes del día y los temas de interés para la audiencia hispana en los EE. UU.

programme.desc: Un adolescente, cuyo padre abandonó a él y su madre, es enviado a vivir con su abuelo, a quien apenas conoce.

programme.desc: Una pareja de recién casados lucha una batalladespués de adquirir acres de tierra para construir su rancho.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin has the pleasure of looking over a rust-free 1966 Dodge Charger from the Arizona desert with all the right factory options.Next, Colin appraises a 1969 Dodge Coronet Super Bee that is an all-original California-built car. Packaged with a 383ci V8 and a factory N96 air grabber hood, Colin thinks this to be an attractive car based on its unique color combo of high-impact F6 metallic green and black interior. But, original cars do come with flaws and Colin found a few in the rear end of the car.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: 90,000sqft or six barns full of dusty, rusty, forgotten treasures from decades of collecting. To name a few, GTOs, Caprices, Firebirds, Blazers, Suburban, Trucks, Jeeps, Broncos, and some pre-war cars. Everything is for sale and everything must go. Message email above, serious inquiries only.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom Cotter gets an exclusive and in-depth tour of the Detroit Historical Society's backroom collection, showcasing priceless Detroit icons. These rare cars are meticulously preserved in climate-controlled bubbles known as car capsules to suspend and slow the aging process so future generations have the opportunity to enjoy them.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: The Flathead V-8 in this barn find Ford F1 pickup is FILLED with oil sludge. Can Davin and Jeff get it cleaned out enough to get this beauty of a farm truck running again? BONUS FEATURE AT THE END! Watch an incredible time-lapse rebuild of a flathead Ford V8 engine!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: BIG NEWS: This is the first video in a five-part series featuring a DeTomaso Pantera, a collaboration between "Redline Rebuild" and "Barn Find Hunter". On "Barn Find Hunter," we always uncover cars that have been hidden for years and delve into their fascinating stories. Typically, we are involved in the initial phase of the barn find story, step one. Rarely do we have the privilege of witnessing steps two and three: the exchange of ownership and the restoration. Today is that special day! Tom's son, Brian, has purchased a DeTomaso Pantera that has been frozen in time for nearly 40 years. The Pantera gets loaded onto a flatbed and taken back to the shop for a thorough assessment of its condition, with plans to get the engine running and potentially turn it into our next Redline Rebuild project. Stay tuned for more videos from the Redline Rebuild Team!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom travels to Michigan to visit Mick, a previous guest on our 'Will it Run' series with Davin Reckow. Mick has a massive collection of Chrysler 'Hemi' cars, rare one-off models, and some celebrity-owned vehicles, specifically, 'The Fonz's' motorcycle.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Rob Ida's custom car shop, where he checks out his barn-find projects and gets an EXCLUSIVE tour of his one-of-a-kind shop. The best way to explain Rob's shop is not only by calling it a car shop but also an innovation factory. Using the latest technology in metal CNC stretching, 3D printing, and electronic accessories, Rob and his team are setting a new standard for what it means to build custom cars. Follow along as he shows us the latest projects and technology the engineering world has to offer.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: While in St. George, Utah, Tom learns of a junkyard with hundreds of solid old cars, where the owner never sold anything and never allowed anyone inside. Tom makes a few phone calls and sweet-talks his way into Blake's Auto Salvage.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: This Dodge Challenger was parked in the early '90s and hasn't been touched since. Can Davin bring it back to its former glory and get it running and driving again?

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: Last time we got this iconic 1970 Dodge Challenger TA 340 Six Pack running, but we weren't satisfied with just that. We wanted to see it back on the road again too. (We also wanted to give it a good detailing!)

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Cliff who has a great collection of cars but Tom's main interest is with Cliff's son's 1957 Austin A35. The 1957 Austin A35 was restored by an anonymous person as part of a charity program.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Near the historic Bay of Navarino, blanketed by olive, citrus trees and home to historical culinary artifacts unearthed in prehistoric clay tablets at Pylos, Diane cooks with two village ladies, making a local pork and fig dish, and olive-oil fried bread. Inspired by the cornucopia of olive oil, oranges and other local delicacies, she cooks up a Messinian meal.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.sub-title: Evia - An Island Hiding In Plain Sight
programme.desc: The second-largest Greek island and an hour from Athens, Diane heads out in search of mushrooms with a local mushroom forager and cultivator. They cook a favorite local recipe "kritharoto," mushrooms with orzo. Diane makes three delectable dishes with mushrooms, wine and local ingrediants, inspired by the flavors of this nearby "secret" land.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores the rich, cuisine of Corfu, a mixture of Greek, Italian, French and others. A local cook makes a Venetian soffrito, and orange salad. In the market: Corfu's famous kumquats, ouzo-infused figs, local fish. Diane cooks up mixed braised greens with feta, an Italian fish stew called bourtheto and Venetian pastitsio, reworked for the modern cook.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: To embrace the cosmopolitan aura of this island, Diane visits Alkis Downward, who created a sustainable agriculture project on one of Greece's most touristed Aegean islands. Discover the food of Paros and its local recipes: rabbit, skate salad and air-dried mackerel. Diane prepares a Greek island meal that will make you want to sail straight to the Aegean.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In Chios, a local ritual: the making of Chian firewater, Souma, distilled from fermented figs. In this foray through Chios's traditions, Diane discovers delicious desserts, all part of the table for this feast. Chios is for food lovers, and Diane returns to her kitchen for some great island-inspired dishes. Eggplant pilaf and an aromatic meat-filled omelet are on the menu.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits Lefkada, where she discovers Greece's tastiest, tenderest lentils, rosewater vinegar, and the art of local embroidery. A local cook imparts the secrets of the local lemony cod stew. Diane succumbs to the siren's call of flavors and history known as the Ionian Islands and prepares a bevy of dishes from several of these lush, delicious lands off Greece's western coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane introduces us to some of the islands' customs, landscapes and culinary delights: wine-soaked cheeses, grape leaves stuffed with everything, pasta with caramelized onions and a tart fermented cheese, sparkling wines, cumin-scented rusks and tiny, crunchy shrimp. These delectable recipes will have us all wanting to cook with the flavors of Dodecanese for dinner.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The deep connection between wine and barbecue dates back millennia. In the Santa Ynez, grape vines are used as fuel and wine for marinades, sauces. Jidori-breed chicken breasts stuffed with ham and dry-aged cheese. Grilled flank steak with Pinot Noir mushroom sauce grilled. Chef John Cox from the Bear and Star restaurant smokes a whole bourbon-soaked wagyu strip loin.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The perfect grilled steak, using a range of savvy grilling techniques. Leading off is a thick dry-brined New York strip with luscious anchovy crema. Tender lamb steaks come with herb-scented Moroccan Charmoula. In today's field trip chef Curtis Stone grills an 80 day-aged rib steak over a wood fire at Gwen Butcher Shop and Restaurant in L.A.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Fish Hits the Fire. Steven walks you through the grilling process—from whole fish to fire-roasting shellfish. Singapore-spiced halibut grilled in banana leaves. Whole fish with Indonesian flavors by Rafael Lunetta, in Santa Monica. Alaskan salmon riffs on Russian coulibiac, with a stuffing of grilled onions, mushrooms, rice and smoke. Finally, grilling fresh oysters with Asian aromatics.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Extending from California and the Pacific Northwest to Korea, Japan, and Southeast Asia. Explosively flavored grilled meats with exotic herbs and spices, chilies and umami-rich fish and soy sauce are paired with healthy vegetables—barbecue as health food. Vietnamese and Thai influences make the ultimate street food. Steven visits Jenee Kim for grilled beef short ribs.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Grilling 24/7. The world's pit masters, fire up grills, smokers, or wood-burning ovens for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and late night snacks. For breakfast, farm eggs grilled with Parmesan, and prosciutto. For lunch, pizzas from the Industrial Eats in Buellton, CA. Pastrami Beef Ribs make a spectacular supper, and midnight snack of smoky, salty South African Grilled Cheese sandwiches.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Extreme Grilling. Long before grills, charcoal, rotisseries, and planchas, there was fire! We visit L.A.'s Chi SPACCA, for a monster pork tomahawk grilled over wood by chef Ryan DeNicola. Extreme grilling with salmon steaks, smoky, on a shovel in a blazing campfire. Caveman-style pork chops directly on blazing embers with a sizzling poblano pan-fry and decadent brownies on a cedar plank.

programme.title: The Showstopper
programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a "green energy" bio-diesel vehicle, Froy's (Froylan Tercero) lack of knowledge of the vehicle's specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze... and when his error causes it to explode, he and Matt (Matt Burch) abandon builders/owners Mickie (Michael Q. Schmidt) and Joey (Gino Calabro) in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: Nursery Crime
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift, but a language barrier causes chaos. Matt and Froy are in danger when Froy refuses to call the cops on a gun-wielding debtor.

programme.title: Call for Help
programme.desc: With the pressure of Froy's legal problems mounting, the team does everything they can to convince him to hire a lawyer. Froy and Matt confront a misogynist frat boy with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy wrangle with a squadron of costumed rally racers, and Lou, Matt, and Froy get the surprise of a lifetime when they're faced with a truck-full of vicious gangsters.

programme.title: The Big Letdown
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret. And finally, the team's attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for.

programme.title: The Waiting Game
programme.desc: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer about his warrant in Texas, he considers taking matters into his own hands. Lou and Froy bust some slick moves in an attempt to wrangle a car from a debtor who is prepared to battle. Then, when one woman behaves like a child, Matt puts her in timeout, but worries he may have gone too far. And finally, Lou, Matt, and Froy take on an jealous husband with deadly aim.

programme.title: Knife Week
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse and Froy finds himself in more trouble than he can handle. Back in LA, Lou and Lyndah repo a car from a deceptive charity worker, and Lou is left to protect the girls from two knife wielding debtors who will go to any lengths to keep their vehicles.

programme.title: Think, Adapt and Attack
programme.desc: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats, chaos erupts, and Lou, Lyndah and Sonia fight not only with them, but also with each other. Down in Texas, Matt and Froy wait to clear up Froy's warrant and get in way over their heads working for a local repo team. Meanwhile, Lou decides to re-hire Frankie despite Sonia and Lyndah's objections, but first Lou wants to see how Frankie fares when faced with the temptation in the form of strippers and alcohol.

programme.title: Cement Mixer
programme.desc: Down in Texas, Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer, but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete. In LA, Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor, and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point.

programme.title: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose
programme.desc: First, Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood, dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks. Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia. And finally, Matt and Froy face down a backwoods Texan with secret ammunition.

programme.title: Mess with Texas
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down, and when bullets fly, it starts to look like they may never come back home. Back in LA, Frankie's wild antics jeopardize a repo and push Lyndah to her breaking point.

programme.title: Frankie'd Up Beyond All Recognition
programme.desc: Matt and Froy set out to repo a truck from a wealthy Texan, but their mission backfires when the Sheriff arrives with a new arrest warrant that will send Froy away for good.

programme.title: Monumental Changes
programme.desc: Lou takes his new guys on their very first repo but, when the debtors attack with chainsaws, Ronnie and Carlos are left to fend for themselves.

programme.title: Adapt, Improvise, and Overcome
programme.desc: Lou plans an elaborate sting operation to infiltrate a cult, but everything goes awry when the new guys aren't prepared and Matt is left picking up the pieces.

programme.title: Deep Dish Disaster
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia repo from a stranded motorist who rallies the neighborhood around his cause and incites a full on revolt. Ronnie and Carlos set out on their first unsupervised repo, but their desire to impress is quickly derailed when an erratic debtor lets loose with pepper spray.

programme.title: Traffic Jammin'
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah confront a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs

But did you know they make some of the best mother's in the wild? Witness the maternal instinct of a mommy alligator.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.sub-title: A Really Big Day at BGT
programme.desc: Witness a day in the life at Busch Gardens Tampa. From house calls on the Serengeti Plain to emergencies in the Animal Care Center... training lions, elephants, hippos, and orangutans. The educators are making enrichment items for the gorillas in the education kitchen while The Wildlife Docs diagnose a grey kangaroo who might have pneumonia. When your job is to take care of 12,000 animals, every day is a big day at Bush Gardens Tampa.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: We've introduced you to all kinds of baby animals and now its time for a baby update! Out on the Serengeti Plain, we check in on a baby Grevvy zebra named Stitch, Jasiri the baby rhinoceros, and two giraffe calves Tina and Arrow.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: Stanley the wallaby has broken his wrist in two places and must undergo a very delicate surgery to repair it. The recovery will be difficult, and The Wildlife Docs must keep a close eye on him. Plus, the team trains the park's clan of spotted hyenas, and the reluctant female leader of the group is due in for a checkup.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: The Wildlife Docs come to the rescue when a family finds an injured baby red-shouldered hawk in the wild… alone… with no mother hawk in sight. Then, the oldest female member of the park's wildebeest herd is ill. Witness the team as they attempt to bring one of these large mammals into the Animal Care Center for the very first time.

programme.title: Ready, Set, Pet

programme.title: A Dog For Life
programme.desc: Mom and son pair, The Boolah's, moved from Johannesburg to Cape Town a few years ago, and unfortunately, due to their circumstances could not take their dogs with. They are now in a position to bring a four-legged companion home to complete their family. Nikki and her husband have suffered great loss, but have found hope by adopting the most gentle, loving and befitting senior dog.

programme.title: A Dog For Life
programme.desc: The Madurai's are both doctors looking for a furkid who will ease them into the idea of parenthood: a dog that is not too much hard work, that likes being calm at home, and importantly, a dog that doesn't mess too much. Mike is a 28-year-old epileptic man, suffering from grand-mal seizures. His seizures were so unmanaged and unpredictable that he didn't leave his flat for months. He's been matched with a seizure response medic alert dog, Jewel, who is able to give him confidence to live a full life.

programme.title: A Dog For Life

Along the way, they would have to get past 4 trained attack dogs. Stunt two is a gas as they have to stay inside a room full of CS gas (tear gas). The three contestants to stay in the room the longest would advance to the final. For the final, they start driving a car next to a moving car carrier going 40 mph. When a horn sounded, they would have to drive their car up a ramp and into the back of the car carrier. The contestant to do this the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champion and win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Slalom, Piercing, Maggoty Cheese, Flag Snag II
programme.desc: This was an extended 4-stunt episode. For the first stunt, contestants have to hang by their ankles from trapeze hanging from a helicopter that flew over 20 flagpoles. The have to release as many flags as possible. In the second stunt, they are strapped down and their left arm would be pierced by 10 needles which would get progressively thicker. In the third, it's eating 4 ounces stinky cheese crawling with maggots. For the final stunt, contestants shimmy out to the end of horizontal pole 10 stories high, grab a flag, and clip it on to a rope hanging overhead. The fastest would win $50,000

programme.desc: Contestants must ride a motorized scooter across a narrow plank 100 feet above the ground and devour roasted reindeer parts. Host: Joe Rogan.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Bodt Drop, Slug Bugs and Bile, Build-A-Bridge
programme.desc: For the first stunt contestants have to hang from a helicopter skit and drop into the water below as the helicopter flew over a buoy. Once in the water, they would have to retrieve a flag from underneath the buoy, swim with it to a platform, and clip it on a flagpole. Stunt two has them slug it out as they have to eat 10 live slugs and drink a shot of cow bile. For the final, contestants have to build a bridge on two cables from the top of one building to another and climb across the wooden slats provided moving them along the way. The contestant across the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champion and win $50K.
